conditional_stats_storage.finding: Conditional stats (like Jak'Sho gaining armor/MR over time) are NOT stored in the stats object
conditional_stats_storage.evidence: Jak'Sho passive 'Voidborn Resilience' describes 30% bonus armor/MR increase, but passive.stats object contains all zeros
conditional_stats_storage.where_stored: Effects text field with {{as|...}} markup only
conditional_stats_storage.implication: Game engine parses the effects text to implement logic, JSON provides description only

trinity_force_spellblade_damage.finding: Spellblade damage (200% base AD) is stored in effects text only
trinity_force_spellblade_damage.scaling_stored_as: Text in effects: '{{as|200% '''base''' AD}} {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}}'
trinity_force_spellblade_damage.implication: Actual damage calculation done by game engine, not stored as numeric field

active_damage_representation.finding: Active abilities with damage use text markup like {{pp|...}}
active_damage_representation.example_redemption: {{pp|150 to 350|type=target's level}} means scales from 150 at level 1 to 350 at level 18
active_damage_representation.example_liandry: 1% of target's maximum health per tick stored as text, not numeric
active_damage_representation.pattern: Damage values in {{pp|...}} for level scaling, {{as|...}} for emphasis

stat_subfield_usage.flat: Most common - used for base item stats (50 AD, 45 armor, etc.)
stat_subfield_usage.percent: Used for scaling bonuses (e.g., 10% movement speed per stack)
stat_subfield_usage.percentBase: Rare - alternative to percent in some contexts
stat_subfield_usage.percentBonus: Rare - percent of bonus stats only

examples.name: Shurelya's Battlesong
examples.active_effect: Grants 30% bonus movement speed for 4 seconds to you and nearby allies

examples.name: Redemption
examples.active_effect: 5500 range beam - heal allies 150-350 (scales with level), damage enemies 10% max health as true damage

examples.name: Knight's Vow
examples.active_effect: Designate target ally - form tether for damage redirection
